@graph.schema:legalName: White Sea Hydrology and Zooplankton Time Series: Kartesh D1
@graph.schema:name: White Sea Hydrology and Zooplankton Time Series: Kartesh D1
@graph.schema:description: White Sea Hydrology and Zooplankton Time Series: Kartesh D1. The ongoing monitoring program have been accomplished since 1957, on a regular basis - since 1961. Sampling is conducted once 10 days in warm period (ice-free) and in March-April and once a month from December through February. Station depth is 60-65 m depending on tide phase and positioning accuracy. Standard horizons are sampled by vertical hauls: 10-0 m, 25-10 m and bottom-25 m. Standard Juday net with opening diameter 37 cm and 200-µm mesh size is used.

schema:geo.schema:description: Bounding box polygon with lat long (Y X) coordinate order.

schema:funding.schema:description: Project “Dynamics of structure and functioning of the ecosystems of the White Sea and adjacent Arctic seas” (No 1021051402749-2)
